statement.p: A construction team maintains a {28}-mile-long sewage pipe. Each day, the team can cover {{\frac{2}{7}}} of a mile. How many days will it take the team to complete the maintenance of the entire sewage pipe?
It will take the team days to complete maintaining the entire sewage pipe.

solution.p: In this problem, the team maintains {{\frac{2}{7}}} miles of sewage pipe every day, until they complete all {28} miles. This is like repeatedly taking away {{\frac{2}{7}}} miles from {28} miles, a division problem.
It will take the team {98} days to complete maintaining the entire sewage pipe.
